content.en:
This time, Ye Tian's luck was better, and he successfully engraved the black text representing the extreme path of extreme time on the Pagoda of Will.

With the successful inscription of this black text, the Will Pagoda was strengthened again, and the Will Pagoda fed back the physical body, which also strengthened Ye Tian's physical body and raised the body of the original ancestor.

"I comprehended a total of six black characters, and I engraved them all!"

Ye Tian decided.

In the following years, he tried again and again, with successes and failures, and it took a long time to engrave the four black characters representing the Extreme Sword Pole, the Extreme Light Pole, the Extreme Defense Pole, and the Extreme Gold Pole on the Pagoda of Will.

In this way, the first six layers of his Will Pagoda were all engraved with black characters, and his strength directly skyrocketed many times.

Under normal circumstances, the Triple Origin Ancestor has engraved the Nine Extreme Paths, and then comprehends the Primordial Control Technique, cultivates to reach the limit of the Triple Ancestor, and adds the Will Pagoda to reach the thirty-sixth layer or above, you can break through to the Quadruple Ancestor.

Therefore, Ye Tian was now engraved with six extreme extreme paths, even if his cultivation was not improved, his strength was definitely at the top level among the Triple Ancestors.

After all, Ye Tian's background is too strong, and his combat power of the same level is invincible, even if he reaches the Triple Ancestor, this advantage naturally exists.

"I don't know who is stronger compared to the Lord of the Boundless with my current strength?"

Ye Tian muttered.

He felt that the Lord of the Boundless should not be so powerful, otherwise he would not dare to enter that treasure land.

Therefore, it is likely that his strength has surpassed that of the Unbounded Lord.

Since he had just broken through, Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Will had increased a lot, so he condensed the Will Pagoda with some more layers, from the twenty-first level of the Will Pagoda to the twelfth and nineteenth layers of the Will Pagoda in one go.

At this time, it has only reached the current limit, and it is necessary to continue to improve the will of the Extreme Dao in order to continue to condense the layers of the Will Pagoda.

After arriving at the Triple Ancestor, many of Ye Tian's resources were of little effect, and the effect of improving his cultivation was too low and too low.

At this time, Ye Tian finally understood why the Lord of the Unbounded was not interested in the resources of the Ten Directions Black Domain, so those resources were too low-end, and they had almost no effect on the Triple Primordial Ancestor, even if all those resources were taken, the effect of improvement might not be as good as absorbing the energy of the Primordial Black Sea!

"There are a lot of resources in this treasure land, and there are a lot of treasures that have an effect on the Triple Ancestor, with my current strength, I should be able to easily take the resources there!"

Ye Tian muttered.

So, Ye Tian came to this treasure land again.

......

Inside the treasure land.

Ye Tian escaped in, and the terrifying creatures that had allowed him to flee in the past could no longer threaten him at this moment.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian used the top extreme control technique Extreme Mang Sword Light to smash the bodies of terrifying creatures, and in a few moves, he bombarded a creature comparable to the Triple Ancestor.

Soon, a piece of resource treasures was pocketed by Ye Tian.

Subsequently, all of these resources that could be used to improve cultivation were refined by him one by one and used to improve cultivation.

It's a pity that the grade of these resources is not too high, even if some can improve the cultivation of the Triple Origin Ancestor, but the effect is not good, even if they are all refined, don't think about raising them to the limit of the Triple Origin Ancestor.

Of course, Ye Tian didn't care, as long as he could improve his strength a little, it would be fine.

The long years passed slowly, and this treasure land was almost cleared by Ye Tian, and many creatures died at Ye Tian's hands one by one.

Of course, Ye Tian has also encountered crises many times, these creatures are also wise, after discovering that Ye Tian's strength is very strong, many creatures comparable to the Triple Ancestor joined forces to besiege Ye Tian.

That time, Ye Tian did almost fall.

Of course, even if it really falls, the impact is not great, and it will take a lot of resources to replicate it, but it will take a lot of resources to copy the replica body of the Triple Ancestor.

this day.

Ye Tian sent three bodies, two duplicate bodies, and one will clone to kill into the treasure land.

This time, he was going to take the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus.

And the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus should also be the most precious treasure in this treasure land, and it is also the treasure that Ye Tian promised to seize for the Lord of the Boundless.

And in order to seize the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus, Ye Tian severely injured a replica body, successfully took it away, and killed thirteen creatures comparable to the Triple Ancestor.

"Almost all the resources of this treasure land have been robbed by me, and the value is not high!"

Ye Tian left directly, and it is unlikely that he will come in the future.

Maybe new resources will be born here in the future, but at that time, his strength has been improved to the point that he can't look down on this place.

......

"The Lord of Endless looking for me?"

The Lord of the Boundless thought that Ye Tian had come to ask for advice again, and after seeing the Lord of Endless, Ye Tian, he knew that Ye Tian had actually broken through to the Triple Ancestor.

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord for stepping into the Triple Origin Realm!"

The Lord of the Unbounded was a little surprised.

In his opinion, even if Ye Tian had been promoted to the limit of the Dual Origin Ancestor, and wanted to use the Void Inscription Technique to engrave the Extreme Path of the Extreme Space in the Pagoda of Will, the success rate was only thirty and a half percent!

Thirty and a half times seems like a lot, but the first time it is more likely to fail!

Once it fails, the Pagoda of Will is damaged, and it will take a long time to repair the Pagoda of Will, and that time will be measured in trillions of eternal years.

Of course, it is possible to continue to engrave, but the success rate is lower, and it damages the foundation, and no one dares to do so.

And the end of the world does not have the resources and treasures to repair the Will Pagoda, so it can only be repaired slowly by itself.

Therefore, he had never expected Ye Tian to become a Triple Ancestor in a short period of time, and his existence could wait forever, so he was not in a hurry.

But now Ye Tian has broken through and become the Triple Ancestor.

What does this mean?

"The Endless Lord is too lucky, there is a chance that he will succeed the first time!"

The Unbounded Lord's Secret Path.

"Lord of the Unbounded, I'm lucky, I broke through in one go!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

Soon, Ye Tian talked about the topic.

I saw that Ye Tian took out the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus, but he didn't immediately give it to the Lord of the Boundless.

Seeing the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus, the Lord of the Boundless was extremely excited, and he wanted to snatch it over immediately, but he still held back.

"Endless Lord, I didn't expect you to have plucked the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus, can you give it to me?" said the Boundless Lord.

Ye Tian said: "Lord of the Boundless, I promised to help you before, so the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus can give it to you, but at least there are some benefits." I want to get out of the world, so you have to give me a lot of information you know, and I need a wider world. "

"Good!

The Unbounded Lord agreed.
